summary: Verified ADR 0257 on the latest realistic `origin/main` baseline by replaying the governed ServerClaw `SKILL.md` pack contract through the controller CLI, the governed tool registry, the public API gateway, and the seeded Windmill wrapper for workspace `ops`. The exact-main replay ran on top of `origin/main` commit `0b86b8ac4e2c868bab2b489ecff1e44a3913a10c` with repo version context `0.177.116`, repaired adjacent certificate/runtime drift by re-establishing `step-ca` health, stabilized the OpenBao rotatable-secret verification path with transient `500/502/503` retries, and completed clean API gateway, OpenBao, and Windmill converges on `docker-runtime-lv3`.

verification.observed: The latest-main branch passed the targeted ADR 0257 pytest slice (`52 passed`), the OpenBao role regression slice (`19 passed`), `make syntax-check-windmill`, `make syntax-check-api-gateway`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards`, and `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python3 scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`.

verification.check: Controller and governed tool-registry skill resolution
verification.observed: The controller proof and the tool-registry proof both returned two active skills for workspace `ops`, with the workspace-local `platform-observe` override shadowing the bundled pack while the mirrored third-party example remained disabled.

`make converge-api-gateway` succeeded and the public `list-serverclaw-skills` proof returned HTTP `200`, matching the controller output and preserving the `ops` workspace-local `platform-observe` override.

verification.check: Adjacent step-ca and OpenBao replay recovery
verification.observed: A fresh `step-ca` guest-local health probe returned `{"status":"ok"}`, and the exact-main OpenBao replay then completed with recap `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=176 changed=9 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 ok=49 changed=2 failed=0` after the rotatable-secret read path was hardened to retry transient `500/502/503` responses.

verification.check: Windmill exact-main replay and seeded wrapper proof
verification.observed: `make converge-windmill` completed with recap `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=328 changed=54 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 ok=72 changed=0 failed=0`, `proxmox_florin ok=41 changed=4 failed=0`, and the direct `f/lv3/serverclaw_skills` run returned the same active and shadowed skill set as the controller and public API gateway proofs.

notes: This receipt records the latest-main live replay and proof set before the protected integration files are refreshed on `main`.

The final merge-to-main step still needs to update ADR 0257 metadata, cut the next repository release, and advance `versions/stack.yaml.platform_version` from the current integrated baseline once the mainline promotion is complete.
The OpenBao retry hardening was the only code change required during this exact-main replay; the controller, gateway, and Windmill skill-resolution contract itself remained stable.
